## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn tsc` passes locally
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials added to code or config files
- [ ] If a new sidebar route was added, an explicit `<SidebarItem>` entry exists in `Sidebar.tsx`
- [ ] If a new npm plugin was added, confirmed it does not introduce a nested `@backstage/frontend-plugin-api` version conflict
